text.tspan: Disease burden from outdoor particulate matter pollution, 2021

Estimated disease burden from outdoor particulate matter pollution measured in
disability-adjusted life years
Data source: IHME, Global Burden of Disease (2024)

Note: To allow for comparisons between countries and over time, this metric is
age-standardized
.
